articles.title: Subject Matter
articles.summary: Establishes harmonised rules for AI systems in the EU internal market, lays down prohibited practices, requirements for high-risk AI, transparency obligations, GPAI rules, and governance framework.

articles.title: Scope
articles.summary: Applies to providers placing AI on the EU market regardless of establishment, deployers in the EU, and providers/deployers in third countries whose AI output is used in the EU. Exempts military, national security, scientific R&D, and personal non-professional use.

articles.title: Definitions
articles.summary: Defines key terms including AI system, provider, deployer, authorised representative, importer, distributor, operator, putting into service, intended purpose, reasonably foreseeable misuse, safety component, instructions for use, GPAI model, high-impact capabilities, and systemic risk.

articles.title: AI Literacy
articles.summary: Providers and deployers shall ensure sufficient AI literacy among staff and persons handling AI systems, taking into account their technical knowledge, experience, education and training, and context of use.
